parameters.query:
INSERT INTO chat_state (chat_id, shopping_page, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, 1, now())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;

SELECT
  s.id,
  COALESCE(t.name_de, s.ingredient_name) AS ingredient_name,
  s.qty,
  s.unit
FROM shopping_list_items s
LEFT JOIN ingredient_translations t
  ON t.ingredient_key = s.ingredient_key
WHERE s.chat_id = $1
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.name_de, s.ingredient_name) ASC
LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3;

UPDATE chat_state
SET shopping_list_message_id = $1,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE chat_id = $2;

SELECT
  s.id,
  COALESCE(t.name_de, s.ingredient_name) AS ingredient_name,
  s.qty,
  s.unit
FROM shopping_list_items s
LEFT JOIN ingredient_translations t
  ON t.ingredient_key = s.ingredient_key
WHERE s.chat_id = $1
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.name_de, s.ingredient_name) ASC
LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3;

UPDATE chat_state
SET shopping_page = $1,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE chat_id = $2;

SELECT chat_id, shopping_list_message_id
FROM chat_state;

SELECT column_name, data_type
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'chat_state'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;

nodes.name: Optional Debug: Inspect Chat State Columns

parameters.query:
UPDATE chat_state
SET shopping_list_message_id = NULL;

INSERT INTO shopping_list_items
(chat_id, ingredient_key, ingredient_name, qty, unit, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id, ingredient_key, COALESCE(unit,''))
DO UPDATE SET
  qty = COALESCE(shopping_list_items.qty, 0) + COALESCE(EXCLUDED.qty, 0),
  ingredient_name = EXCLUDED.ingredient_name,
  updated_at = now();

UPDATE chat_state
SET shopping_list_message_id = NULL,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE chat_id = $1;

nodes.name: Optional Debug: Check Shopping List Schema

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM shopping_list_items
WHERE chat_id = $1;

nodes.name: Optional Debug: Check Shopping List Index

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { chat_id: $('Parse Telegram Command').item.json.chat_id, text: [ '🍳 Recipe Bot', '', 'Commands', '/recipe — get recipe suggestions', '/list — show shopping list', '/help — show this help', '', 'Buttons', '✅ Add to List', '❌ Skip', '📖 Instructions', '🔄 Refresh', '', 'Setup', 'Enter your Telegram bot token in the Config node and set your PostgreSQL credentials.' ].join('\n'), parse_mode: 'HTML' } }];
